chromatic resonance field

Chordal Resonance
Chromatic

Color is not assigned statically. The field slowly inherits tonal dominance, cultural harmonic association, interval tension, and inverse-register balance. Warm lower frequencies ground. Higher harmonics cool and widen.
The One
listening
Field Resonance
Pair Harmony0%
Triadic Coherence0%
Dominant RegisterLow
Chromatic DriftStable
The field is waiting. Color has not yet inherited the chord.
